proposed_relations.description: Roundtable discussion topics for the 34th Street Transitway design

evidence_refs.source_quote: Attendees were asked to break into groups of eight to discuss three general topics that could affect the overall Transitway design: 1) transit operations , 2) traffic operations , and 3) curbside access/deliveries .

decisions.rationale: Claim directly describes roundtable discussion topics about the 34th Street Transitway design at CAC Meeting #2; evidence quote explicitly names 'Transitway design'.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Attendees were asked to break into groups of eight to discuss three general topics that could affect the overall Transitway design: 1) transit operations , 2) traffic operations , and 3) curbside access/deliveries .

proposed_relations.description: CAC concerns about traffic congestion and safety from Transitway non-bus traffic flow options

evidence_refs.source_quote: For all three options of how the proposed Transitway would accommodate non-bus traffic flow – eastbound only, westbound only, or outbound only – CAC members voiced concern about potential traffic congestion and safety conditions on streets north and south of 34th Street.

decisions.rationale: Claim states CAC members voiced concerns about the proposed Transitway's effects on traffic congestion and safety; evidence explicitly names 'proposed Transitway'.

evidence_refs.source_quote: For all three options of how the proposed Transitway would accommodate non-bus traffic flow – eastbound only, westbound only, or outbound only – CAC members voiced concern about potential traffic congestion and safety conditions on streets north and south of 34th Street.

proposed_relations.description: CAC concerns about safety implications of traffic diversions from 34th Street Transitway

evidence_refs.source_quote: CAC members voiced concern about safety implications of traffic diversions from 34th Street, including possible impacts on the number of crashes among vehicles, as well as between vehicles and both bicycles and pedestrians.

decisions.rationale: Claim describes safety concerns from traffic diversions caused by the 34th Street Transitway; evidence names '34th Street' in context of the Transitway project.

evidence_refs.source_quote: CAC members voiced concern about safety implications of traffic diversions from 34th Street, including possible impacts on the number of crashes among vehicles, as well as between vehicles and both bicycles and pedestrians.

proposed_relations.description: Accessibility concerns about Transitway design for disabled community

evidence_refs.source_quote: Another concern raised was the effect of Transitway design and operations on the disabled community, particularly the blind when crossing at intersections and wheelchair bound riders who need to access center island bus stops.

decisions.rationale: Claim explicitly discusses the effect of 'Transitway design and operations' on the disabled community.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Another concern raised was the effect of Transitway design and operations on the disabled community, particularly the blind when crossing at intersections and wheelchair bound riders who need to access center island bus stops.

proposed_relations.description: Suggestion to locate the Transitway on the south side of 34th Street

evidence_refs.source_quote: Locating the Transitway on the south side of 34th Street would be good for businesses west of Sixth Avenue, as it would impact curb access the least.

decisions.rationale: Claim explicitly mentions 'Locating the Transitway on the south side of 34th Street'.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Locating the Transitway on the south side of 34th Street would be good for businesses west of Sixth Avenue, as it would impact curb access the least.

proposed_relations.description: CAC suggested variations for non-bus traffic flow on the Transitway

evidence_refs.source_quote: • Retaining two-way non-bus traffic operations at the far ends of 34th Street. • Making non-bus traffic lanes reversible by time of day.

decisions.rationale: Claim discusses CAC-suggested variations to Transitway non-bus traffic flow options; from CAC meeting minutes about the Transitway.

evidence_refs.source_quote: • Retaining two-way non-bus traffic operations at the far ends of 34th Street. • Making non-bus traffic lanes reversible by time of day.

proposed_relations.description: Outbound flow Transitway design option provides most bus passing opportunity

evidence_refs.source_quote: It was noted that the Transitway design option that restricted non-bus traffic to outbound flow (i.e., eastbound east of 5th Avenue and westbound west of 6th Avenue) would offer the most opportunity for buses to pass other buses waiting at stops

decisions.rationale: Claim explicitly names 'the Transitway design option' with detailed description of outbound flow configuration.

evidence_refs.source_quote: It was noted that the Transitway design option that restricted non-bus traffic to outbound flow (i.e., eastbound east of 5th Avenue and westbound west of 6th Avenue) would offer the most opportunity for buses to pass other buses waiting at stops

proposed_relations.description: CAC interest in #7 subway extension as alternative to the Transitway

evidence_refs.source_quote: Extending the #7 subway line east under 34th Street as an alternative to the Transitway.

decisions.rationale: Claim explicitly names the Transitway: '#7 subway line ... as an alternative to the Transitway'.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Extending the #7 subway line east under 34th Street as an alternative to the Transitway.

proposed_relations.description: CAC interest in buses vs. light rail comparison for the Transitway

evidence_refs.source_quote: Choice of buses vs. light rail along on the Transitway.

decisions.rationale: Claim explicitly references 'the Transitway' in the evidence quote discussing buses vs. light rail.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Choice of buses vs. light rail along on the Transitway.

proposed_relations.description: CAC interest in non-bus vehicle restriction under outbound Transitway option

evidence_refs.source_quote: Restriction against any non-bus vehicles between Fifth and Sixth Avenues under the outbound Transitway option.

decisions.rationale: Claim explicitly names 'the outbound Transitway option'.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Restriction against any non-bus vehicles between Fifth and Sixth Avenues under the outbound Transitway option.

proposed_relations.description: Suggested 4-hour delivery windows for Transitway curbside access

evidence_refs.source_quote: Suggested 4-hour delivery windows for curb delivery activity, like on First and Second Avenues.

decisions.rationale: Claim from CAC meeting minutes about the 34th Street Transitway; payload subject explicitly names '34th Street Transitway curbside access'. The delivery windows suggestion was raised in the context of Transitway curbside access/deliveries as a roundtable topic (p001_c0011).

evidence_refs.source_quote: Suggested 4-hour delivery windows for curb delivery activity, like on First and Second Avenues.
